tweets.title: Claude Code 下个版本：子代理默认后台运行，无需等待即可继续对话
tweets.desc: In the next version of Claude Code: subagents run in the background by default, so you can keep talking to Claude while your subagents work

tweets.title: Codex 使用额度全面重置：后台消耗过快问题溯源与修复
tweets.desc: Codex usage limits fully reset with one additional reset credited. Investigation found auto-review had become more proactive, background suggestions could run twice or retry too frequently. All fixes deployed across CLI, desktop app, and usage backend.

tweets.title: Codex 推出可复用权限配置文件：OS 级文件规则绑定域名/Unix Socket
tweets.desc: Advanced Codex users: reusable, inheritable permission profiles binding OS-enforced file read/write/deny rules (even **/*.env) to per-domain network + Unix sockets. Plus fail-closed admin allowlists — least privilege per task.

tweets.title: Claude 正式登陆 Microsoft Foundry，Azure 上全面可用
tweets.desc: Claude in Microsoft Foundry is now generally available, hosted on Azure. Azure customers get Claude Opus 4.8 and Claude Haiku 4.5, with Azure authentication, billing, and commitment retirement. Prompt caching and extended thinking supported.

tweets.title: 封闭 AI vs 开放权重：核心争论——前沿差距决定一切
tweets.desc: If a closed stack is always at the frontier by a wide margin, gatekeeping works. If open weights AI can remain a close second, the equation reverses — the vast majority of tokens will go to an alternative stack controlled and monetized by someone else.

tweets.title: Vercel Serverless Functions 扩容 20 倍，支持部署任何应用
tweets.desc: 20x larger functions on Vercel. You can deploy anything and everything to Vercel. More tomorrow.

tweets.title: Cursor 推出移动端 App：随时随地捕捉灵感写代码
tweets.desc: Wherever ideas hit — desks and laptops optional. Get the Cursor mobile app.

tweets.title: Claude Code 团队成员分享写作方法论：反复迭代打磨
tweets.desc: My process for writing: do some engineering work, talk to people, brainstorm with Claude, write a post, give 1-2 talks on it, rewrite the post, give another talk, rewrite the intro, wake up at 6am and rewrite it again, then post.

tweets.title: 开放权重模型崛起反而加强 Google 地位：企业需要托管平台
tweets.desc: The rise of strong open-weight models like GLM will actually strengthen Google's position — more companies will experiment with fine-tuning open models and value accrues to infra. Enterprises want a managed platform with enterprise-grade reliability, and Google Cloud is well positioned there.

tweets.title: 实测对比：Claude Web 写作编辑仍优于 Codex 和 Claude Code
tweets.desc: For writing and editing, plain vanilla Claude web is still the best (vs Codex and Claude Code). My guess is something in the coding agent's system prompts make them crappier writers.

tweets.title: Anthropic PM 观点：AI 时代写作的市场价值大幅上升
tweets.desc: The market value of writing has gone way up — good writing is required for building products (steering models) and building an audience. Writing has historically been undervalued in tech. Time to change that.

tweets.title: 开源 Chrome 扩展：将稍后阅读列表自动安排到日历中
tweets.desc: Built a Chrome extension that turns your 'read later' list into dedicated reading time on your calendar. Save 5 articles → auto-books a 30-min reading block on Google Calendar. No account, no server, everything local. Open source.

tweets.title: YC CEO：AI 时代核心是建设电力和数据中心
tweets.desc: Build power and datacenters — the infrastructure race is on.

tweets.title: Claude Code 质量下降调查：三处改动导致，已全部修复并重置额度
tweets.desc: Anthropic traced reports of worsened Claude Code responses to three separate issues: default reasoning dropped from high to medium, a caching bug that cleared thinking history repeatedly, and a verbosity-reduction prompt that hurt coding quality. All resolved as of April 20. Usage limits reset for all subscribers.

tweets.title: Anthropic 详解 Managed Agents 架构：将「大脑」与「双手」解耦的设计哲学
tweets.desc: Managed Agents decouples the brain (Claude + harness) from the hands (sandboxes) and the session, allowing each to fail or be replaced independently. Key improvements: 60% TTFT reduction, p95 over 90%. Tokens are never reachable from the sandbox. Session is durable log outside Claude's context window.

tweets.title: Claude Managed Agents 更新：自托管沙箱和 MCP 隧道，执行完全在企业边界内
tweets.desc: Claude Managed Agents can now operate in self-hosted sandboxes and connect to private MCP servers via tunnels. Sandbox runs on your own infra or managed providers: Cloudflare, Daytona, Modal, or Vercel. MCP tunnels allow agents to reach internal services without exposing them to the public internet.

summary:
**洞察一：AI Coding Agent进入后台化与精细化时代**——Claude Code子代理默认后台运行，Codex推出权限配置文件并修复后台消耗问题，AI编码助手竞赛进入稳定性与效率的深水区。

**洞察二：开放模型崛起反而加强云平台地位**——Box CEO Aaron Levie指出前沿差距决定一切，Google前高管认为GLM等开放模型让价值积累到基础设施层，YC呼吁建设电力和数据中心，Claude登陆Azure印证云平台成为AI时代操作系统。

**洞察三：写作成为AI时代核心竞争力，AI Agent向移动端拓展**——Anthropic PM认为写作市场价值大幅上升，Cursor推出移动App，AI工具正渗透到碎片化时间管理中。
